observations: Well-structured module with clear docstrings and documentation
Clean separation between format detection, dequantization, and loading
Good use of type hints and error handling
Comprehensive comments explaining the CT format vs GPTQ/AWQ differences
Tests cover model existence, format detection, layer loading, shape validation
All tests pass on remote GPU server validation
Properly integrated with existing weight_loader.py utilities
Output format matches GPTQ loader expectations
Skip patterns correctly handle vision layers
Excellent module-level docstring explaining CT format
Method docstrings explain parameters and return values
Comments explain N-major vs K-major packing differences
